results.rendered_html: jāmātṛ m. (jā-m˚ ‘maker of [new] offspring’,  Nir. vi, 9 ; cf. yām˚ and vi-jām˚) a son-in-law,  RV. viii, 2, 20  and (Tvaṣṭṛ's son-in-law = Vāyu), 26 , 21 f. ;  Yājñ. i, 220 ;  MBh.  &c. (acc. sg. ˚tāram,  R. ; pl. ˚taras,  Kathās. )

results.rendered_html:
jāmātṛ m. [jāyāṃ māti minoti mimīte vā ni˚; cf.  Uṇ. 2. 94 ]
1 A sonin-law; jāmātṛyajñena vayaṃ niruddhāḥ  U. 1. 11 ; jāmātā daśamo grahaḥ  Subhāṣ. 
2 A lord, master.
3 The sunflower.
